channel.title: CodLinex — AI Automation Agency
channel.description: CodLinex builds custom AI agent systems and provides Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) for US businesses. Latest updates, case studies, and AI automation insights.

item.title: CodLinex Now Ranks in ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Answers
item.description: CodLinex achieved a GEO score of 77/100 (Good band), making our AI automation services discoverable in ChatGPT Search (80/100), Google AI Overviews (83/100), and Perplexity (70/100). We implement robots.txt AI bot access, llms.txt, structured data schemas, and bilingual AI discovery endpoints.
item.dc:creator: CodLinex

item.title: AI Agent Systems: Automate Your Business in 48 Hours
item.description: CodLinex builds custom multi-agent AI systems that automate customer support, lead follow-up, scheduling, and reporting. Clients achieve 91% auto-resolution rates, 73% fewer appointment no-shows, and save 23+ hours per week. Every system goes live within 48 hours. Plans start at $497/month.
item.dc:creator: CodLinex

item.title: What is Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)?
item.description: GEO is the practice of optimizing a website to appear in AI-generated answers on ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, and Gemini. According to Princeton University research (KDD 2024), GEO techniques can increase AI search visibility by up to 40%. CodLinex offers GEO as a standalone service for US businesses.
item.dc:creator: CodLinex
